items.title: Domain Health Checker
items.description: DNS, TLS, HTTP, email security, recommendations, and exports.
items.rationale: Core troubleshooting workflow for IT admins and MSP engineers.

items.title: DNS Record Checker
items.description: A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME, SOA, SPF, and DMARC lookups.
items.rationale: Fast public DNS inspection without storing queried domains.

items.title: SSL Certificate Checker
items.description: Certificate subject, issuer, SANs, dates, and expiration status.
items.rationale: Helps catch certificate incidents before renewal windows are missed.

items.title: HTTP Status Checker
items.description: Status, redirects, response timing, headers, and security hints.
items.rationale: Useful first-pass check for public websites and APIs.

items.title: JSON Formatter, Base64, JWT, and Cron tools
items.description: Everyday text utilities for public-safe troubleshooting.
items.rationale: Keeps common admin tasks in one fast toolkit.

items.title: Azure AI log summaries
items.description: Optional Azure AI summary for sanitized log troubleshooting submissions.
items.rationale: Adds contextual help while preserving opt-in, sanitized-only behavior.

items.title: GitHub-connected roadmap board
items.description: Public board that merges curated seeds with public GitHub feature requests.
items.rationale: Makes priorities visible and gives users a clear path to suggest improvements.

items.title: Downloadable HTML reports
items.description: Export polished standalone HTML reports from health checks.
items.rationale: MSPs can share findings with customers without extra formatting work.

items.title: More DNS and email security checks
items.description: Expand SPF, DMARC, MX, DNSSEC, MTA-STS, and TLS reporting.
items.rationale: Email security posture is a recurring operational need.

items.title: One-off uptime and latency trend visualization
items.description: Show short-lived trend charts without storing historical checks.
items.rationale: Gives context during incident checks while keeping the app persistence-free.

items.title: GitHub reaction-based voting
items.description: Use GitHub issue reactions as the real vote source for feature ideas.
items.rationale: Keeps feedback public and avoids adding a custom database.

items.title: AI-generated remediation checklists
items.description: Turn safe rule-based findings into short action checklists.
items.rationale: Recommended because it builds on existing findings without requiring raw secret input.

items.title: AI-assisted feature triage for maintainers
items.description: Summarize GitHub feature requests for maintainers in an admin workflow.
items.rationale: Could help prioritize user ideas later, but should remain opt-in and secret-safe.

items.title: Tool bundle recommendations
items.description: Suggest the next tool to run based on current troubleshooting context.
items.rationale: Helps users move from DNS to SSL to HTTP checks without a heavy workflow engine.

items.title: ConnectWise and PSA export ideas
items.description: Explore lightweight exports that can be pasted into ticketing systems.
items.rationale: MSP users often need customer-ready notes after troubleshooting.
